title: Spear Effects
description: Adds visual effects for the spear
body:
Spear Effects!

This mod adds visual effects to the spear, such as lunge effects and charge effects! --- ### Information: I found the spear to be *extremely* boring in terms of visual effects, so I decided to make this mod which adds effects from spear lunges and moving fast while charging. ### Showcase: ![Lunge Effect - Wind](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b673bbd2b84645a5f0023cb68e7c83c13d8e7d18.gif) ![Lunge Effect - Droplets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07e4db059286f235f8981dd9644a6f2ce06b7b99.gif) ![Lunge Effect - Hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d4fc876ae8abec1fd815fe9cd8c88df6e20814b.gif) ![Lunge Effects - Lightning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b4e97e60be1f18ec74cb74fe11e4d74ea9722de.gif) ![Lunge Effects - Ghosts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/283f42f03e1d1f06305eaad9664dea5d79023d7f.gif) --- **Credits** - Mod: Walksy *Mod inspired by [Mas Effects](https://modrinth.com/mod/mas-effects) - MasUN0*
